name: Finish schedule extraction
description: Extract the room finish schedule from A-3.1, which has walls split into A/B/C/D columns, ceiling materials, and numbered remarks (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

inputs.user_prompt: Extract the room finish schedule from Holabird Academy sheet A-3.1 and output to Excel

expected_behavior: Locates the finish schedule table on the sheet
Correctly identifies all columns: RM NO, NAME, COLOR SCHEME, FLOOR, BASE, WALLS A/B/C/D, CLG MATL, REMARKS
Handles the multi-column WALLS header (A, B, C, D sub-columns)
Extracts all room rows including corridors, stairs, vestibules, and special rooms
Preserves finish abbreviations exactly (BBT, CPT, PT, CONC, EPOXY, etc.)
Produces valid xlsx with proper header structure
ground_truth_notes: Manually transcribed from A-3.1. Finish abbreviations: BBT=broadloom/broadloom tile, CPT=carpet, PT=porcelain tile, CONC=concrete, EPOXY=epoxy, WD=wood, RM=rubber mat, VCT=vinyl composition tile. Walls: PTD=painted, CT=ceramic tile, AWP=acoustic wall panel, DWC=demountable wall, WCV=wall covering. Ceilings: APC=acoustic panel ceiling, GYP=gypsum, EXP=exposed, FRP=fiberglass reinforced panel, DPC=decorative panel ceiling.

accuracy.description: Cells matching ground truth / total cells

multi_column_header.description: WALLS A/B/C/D sub-columns correctly parsed as separate columns
